messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0049",
  "title": "游戏内容与系统",
  "page_index": 22,
  "page_range": "22"
}

Section text:

message.content: This section contains only the heading "游戏内容与系统" (Game Content and Systems) and lacks substantive content. It can only answer high-level topic questions regarding the document's coverage of game mechanics, features, or system architecture. It provides no information to answer questions about specific entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types.
